other_findings.finding: DC2 co-locates with pre-dermal condensate (pre-Dc) cells in Visium spatial transcriptomics data, along with DC1, LTi and ILC3
DC2 is present from first trimester in prenatal skin, prior to bone marrow production

evidence_quotes.quote: pre-dermal condensate (pre-Dc) cells co-located with dendritic and lymphoid cells based on correlation analyses
evidence_quotes.context: Spatial microenvironment analysis showing DC2 co-location with pre-Dc cells

evidence_quotes.quote: Bar plot showing cell type co-location ... for selected cell type pairs (pre-dermal condensate and immune cells: DC1, DC2, LTi and ILC3)
evidence_quotes.context: Extended data figure legend explicitly listing DC2 among immune cells co-locating with pre-Dc
